PUH-BrianMartell Theorem 83 (Mathematical Derivation of E₈ Lattice Orientations via Root System and Automorphism Group in PUH v61) The E₈ root lattice Λ₈ ⊂ ℝ⁸ is defined by the coordinate description above. Its 240 roots of squared length 2 generate all nearest-neighbour directions. The automorphism group O(Λ₈) ≅ W(E₈) ⋊ {±1} (order 1 393 459 200) exhausts the discrete orientations: any orientation of a lattice block corresponds to one coset in O(8)/O(Λ₈), fixing a rigid set of root directions.
